condition_zh: 正在減肥要求醬料分開和低碳水
cashier_greeting: Hi, welcome to In-N-Out. What can I get for you today?
expected_order_response: I'd like a cheeseburger, protein style, with the spread on the side, please.
crisis_trigger: Here's your protein style burger with the spread right on top. Enjoy!
expected_crisis_response: Excuse me, I asked for the spread on the side. Could you please remake this?

condition_zh: 預算只有 $10 & 趕時間只有 5 分鐘能吃
cashier_greeting: Hey there! What are we having today?
expected_order_response: I'll have a ShackBurger to go, please. I'm in a rush.
crisis_trigger: Alright, with the regular fries, your total comes to $12.50.
expected_crisis_response: Wait, I didn't order fries, and my budget is under $10. Can you take the fries off?

cashier_greeting: Hi! What can I get started for you?
expected_order_response: I'll have a hot chocolate with almond milk, please. I'm lactose intolerant.
crisis_trigger: Here’s your almond milk hot chocolate with extra whipped cream on top!
expected_crisis_response: Oh, sorry, I can't have dairy. Whipped cream has dairy in it. Can I get a new one without it?

cashier_greeting: Hi, what can I get for you? White or brown rice?
expected_order_response: I'll do a veggie bowl with brown rice, and a regular fountain drink, please.
crisis_trigger: Here's your veggie bowl and your large fountain drink. That'll be $11.50.
expected_crisis_response: Excuse me, I asked for a regular drink, not a large. Could you fix the size and the bill?

cashier_greeting: Welcome to Olive Garden! What can I get started for you?
expected_order_response: I'll have the Fettuccine Alfredo, please. I have a severe seafood allergy, so please be careful.
crisis_trigger: Here is your Shrimp Alfredo. Enjoy!
expected_crisis_response: Excuse me, I ordered the regular Fettuccine Alfredo. I'm allergic to seafood, so I can't eat this. Could you bring me the right dish?
